news.headline: Ireland's Health Service Executive chose Conduent's Maven System to manage infectious diseases, improving disease tracking and public health protection.
news.summary: In Florham Park, New Jersey, Conduent Incorporated (Nasdaq: CNDT) declared that the Health Service Executive (HSE) of the Republic of Ireland has chosen its Maven® Disease Surveillance & Outbreak Management System. This system will be utilized to supervise, control, and report infectious diseases. The purpose is to enhance the monitoring of disease outbreaks and enable quicker responses to safeguard public health. The Maven system will supersede HSE's previous surveillance system for better efficiency in disease tracking and management.

news.headline: GAI and Telos collaborate to boost campus Wi-Fi at U.S. Air Force Academy, improving academic, operational connectivity.
news.summary: GAI and Telos have collaborated to deliver an advanced network upgrade to a leading military academy. The partnership aims to bolster academic and operational connectivity at the institution. This initiative reflects a significant investment in improving communication capabilities, with a focus on ensuring seamless integration of technology. The upgraded network is designed to cater to the academy's specific requirements, with enhanced speeds and reliability to support various activities. This strategic collaboration underscores the commitment to modernizing infrastructure, ultimately benefiting the academy's educational and operational functions.

news.headline: Diamond industry research report offers global and regional market trends 2019-2024, forecasts 2025-2029. Vital resource for understanding industry.
news.summary: A report on the diamond industry, titled "Diamond (CAS 7782-40-3) Industry Research 2025", has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report offers extensive insights on the global and regional market trends from 2019-2024, with forecasts up to 2029. It covers a range of information on diamonds, such as general details, synonyms, chemical composition, safety precautions, hazards, handling procedures, storage requirements, as well as toxicological and ecological information, and transport specifics. This detailed analysis serves as a crucial reference for gaining a comprehensive understanding of the diamond market.

news.headline: Ontario Teachers' Pension Plan Board reports 9.4% one-year return, $29.1B funding surplus, underperformed benchmark by $7.6B.
news.summary: Ontario Teachers' Pension Plan Board achieved a one-year total-fund net return of 9.4%, with net assets growing to $266.3 billion. This marked a significant improvement from the 1.9% return in 2023. Despite underperforming the 2024 benchmark return of 12.9%, resulting in a negative value add of $7.6 billion, the plan delivered a ten-year annualized total-fund net return of 7.4%. The plan reported a strong preliminary funding surplus of $29.1 billion and has been fully funded for the 12th consecutive year. Additionally, Ontario Teachers' achieved its 2025 interim emission reduction target a year early. The plan remains financially healthy and stable, aiming to meet long-term obligations to its members.

news.headline: Star Equity Holdings, Inc. reported Q4 2024 revenue increase by 21% to $17.1M, adjusted EBITDA $1.1M; FY 2024 revenue increased to $53.4M. Gross profit increased by 56% in Q4 and by 7.3% in FY. Operating expenses increased, resulting in net loss of $2.5M in Q4 and $10.4M in FY. Cash and cash equivalents decreased to $5.6M. Acquisition of ADT in March 2025 added Energy Services division. Non-GAAP adjusted net income improved to $0.5M in Q4. The Company also announced a new stock repurchase program.
news.summary: Star Equity Holdings, Inc. reported financial results for Q4 and FY 2024, with Q4 revenues increasing by 21.1% to $17.1 million (from $14.1 million) and gross profit increasing by 55.9% to $4.4 million (from $2.9 million). Adjusted EBITDA for Q4 was $1.1 million. In FY 2024, revenues increased by 16.5% to $53.4 million, although gross profit decreased by 7.3% to $11.1 million. Net loss for FY 2024 was $10.4 million. Cash and cash equivalents decreased to $5.6 million in Dec 2024 from $18.9 million in Dec 2023, and debt increased to $11.3 million from $2.0 million. The company acquired Alliance Drilling Tools in March, establishing a new Energy Services division. Further details on non-GAAP financial measures, operations, and strategic initiatives were also provided. The company has $44.6 million of NOLs as of Dec 31, 2024. Lastly, a conference call was scheduled to discuss the results and outlook.

news.headline: Micron Technology expects to report $1.42/share in Q2 earnings, with revenue of $7.9 billion. Target price raised to $130. Dividend yield at 0.45%.
news.summary: Micron Technology, Inc. will announce its second-quarter financial results on March 20, after the market closes. Analysts predict earnings of $1.42 per share, a significant increase from 42 cents per share in the same quarter last year. The company is anticipated to report quarterly revenue of $7.9 billion, up from $5.82 billion in the previous year. UBS analyst Timothy Arcuri reaffirmed a Buy rating for Micron and raised the price target to $130 from $125. Currently, Micron offers an annual dividend yield of 0.45%, with a quarterly dividend of 12 cents per share (46 cents annually). This information and more are available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Monster Jam partners with Roku for streaming, reaching US audiences. #1 TV streaming platform.
news.summary: Monster Jam, the renowned motorsports event for families and fans worldwide, is now available for streaming in the United States through the Roku platform as of March 20, 2025. The unexpected and unforgettable experience can be accessed via Roku, the leading TV streaming platform in the country. This partnership brings Monster Jam to a wider audience, reaching numerous households across the nation through this popular streaming service.

news.headline: Cars2Charities partners with Tunnels to Towers Foundation to support Gold Star families, veterans & first responders.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Valencia, California, a partnership was announced between Cars2Charities and the Tunnels to Towers Foundation. This collaboration aims to provide vital support to Gold Star families, veterans, and first responders. The partnership signifies a meaningful alliance that will benefit those in need.

news.headline: Shoe Carnival Q4 sales miss at $262.94M, down 6.2% from last year. EPS beats at 54 cents. Comparable store sales decline 6.3%.
news.summary: Shoe Carnival Inc (NASDAQ: SCVL) experienced a drop in premarket trading following the release of its fourth-quarter earnings report. The company disclosed a 6.2% year-on-year decrease in fourth-quarter sales, totaling $262.94 million, which fell short of the analyst consensus of $274.21 million. Comparable store sales fell by 6.3% in the quarter, attributed mainly to ongoing declines in Shoe Carnival sales during non-event periods. The gross profit also declined by 8% to $91.67 million, causing the margin to shrink by 70 basis points to 34.9%. Despite this, the adjusted earnings per share stood at 54 cents, surpassing the estimated 43 cents. Selling, general, and administrative expenses decreased by 2.6% year-on-year to $77.6 million. The operating margin contracted from 7.1% to 5.3%, resulting in a 29% decline in operating income for the quarter, down to $14 million. For more details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: 47m Bilgin Yachts MOONRAKER for Sale on Global Market exclusively by Ikonic Yachts. Built in 2019 in Turkey.
news.summary: A 47-meter luxury yacht named MOONRAKER, manufactured by Bilgin Yachts in Turkey in 2019, has been put up for sale exclusively on the global market by Ikonic Yachts. This stunning superyacht is available for purchase and is currently located in Miami Beach. With a length of 155 feet, MOONRAKER is a remarkable vessel with exceptional naval architecture and design.

news.headline: SEGULA Technologies unveils REMORA Stack for renewable energy storage in industry. Aims for energy autonomy in factories.
news.summary: In Paris on March 20, 2025, SEGULA Technologies introduced the REMORA Stack project aimed at facilitating the energy transition in industry. This initiative focuses on creating a sustainable system for storing large amounts of renewable energy. The project targets sites like factories that need energy self-sufficiency. This innovation promises to address the growing demand for renewable energy storage solutions in key industrial sectors.

news.summary: In a recent development on March 20, 2025, Performance Systems Integration (PSI) announced its acquisition of FirePro LLC, a leading Fire Protection Specialists company, as part of its fire and life safety platform. Headquartered in Portland, Oregon, this strategic move aims to enhance PSI's capabilities in the fire protection sector. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for PSI as it expands its portfolio.

The company recently facilitated a successful transfer to sustain essential services. This initiative aims to assist businesses in the region during these challenging times.

news.headline: OsteoStrong opens new location in Seal Beach, California, offering cutting-edge skeletal strengthening technology. #Expansion #HealthTech
news.summary: Introducing Advanced Skeletal Strengthening Technology to Orange County SEAL BEACH, Calif., March 20, 2025 -- OsteoStrong, an industry leader in skeletal strength training, is set to open a new facility in Seal Beach, Calif. This expansion will provide residents of Orange County with access to state-of-the-art techniques for enhancing bone health and strength. With a focus on scientifically-proven methods, OsteoStrong aims to offer its expertise to a wider audience. The launch of the new location signifies the company's commitment to promoting skeletal wellness in the community.

news.headline: Five Below (NASDAQ:FIVE) beats Q4 estimates with sales of $1.391 billion, adjusted earnings of $3.48/share. Analysts cut forecasts.
news.summary: Retailer Five Below, Inc. surpassed expectations in their fourth-quarter financial report, with adjusted earnings at $3.48 per share compared to the estimated $3.38 per share. The company's sales also exceeded predictions, coming in at $1.391 billion against the anticipated $1.386 billion. CEO Winnie Park emphasized the focus on key strategies for product, value, and store experience, targeting their core customer demographic. Looking ahead, Five Below provided a positive outlook for the first quarter, expecting revenue to exceed current estimates.

news.headline: Williams-Sonoma beats Q4 estimates with earnings of $3.28/share and sales of $2.46 billion; annual operating margin hits 17.9%.
news.summary: Williams-Sonoma, Inc., trading as WSM on NYSE, announced positive fourth-quarter results. Their quarterly earnings stood at $3.28 per share, surpassing the estimated $2.93 per share. The company's quarterly sales were reported at $2.46 billion, beating the expected $2.35 billion. The company attributed this success to their operational efficiency, popular seasonal products, collaborations, and notable growth in retail and online furniture sales. Despite a 1.6% decline in yearly comparisons, they achieved a record annual operating margin of 17.9%. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: JM Test Systems acquires BHD Instrumentation in Canada to expand operations with CEO Adam Hesse, facilitating enhanced services.
news.summary: In Baton Rouge, Louisiana, JM Test Systems, a renowned company offering test and measurement equipment along with calibration services, disclosed its acquisition of BHD Instrumentation. BHD is a prominent provider of industrial products and calibration solutions in Canada. Adam Hesse, the CEO of BHD, will collaborate with JM Test to enhance their presence and services in Canada, aiming to broaden their locations and offerings. The partnership between these two family-founded businesses signifies a commitment to delivering top-notch products and calibration services.

news.headline: California introduces a new crypto scam tracker tool to help spot and avoid fraudulent schemes. In 2024, the DFPI received over 2,668 complaints, shutting down 26 scam sites and revealing $4.6M in consumer losses. The tool provides a glossary to educate users on crypto terms. Be cautious and report any scams not listed. Other US agencies work together to inform and protect investors from crypto scams.
news.summary: The California Department of Financial Protection and Innovation (DFPI) launched a Crypto Scam Tracker tool on Feb. 16, 2023, to help residents spot and avoid crypto scams. In 2024, DFPI received over 2,668 complaints from investors, leading to shutting down 26 crypto scam websites with $4.6 million in consumer losses. The tracker allows the public to search for complaints by company name, scam type, or keywords, offering a glossary of common crypto terms to identify and prevent scams. The FBI reported California faced $1.15 billion in crypto-related losses in 2023. The tracker's educational role in scam prevention includes identifying common scams like the pig butchering scam, rug pull scams, crypto job scams, wallet drainer scams, fraudulent trading platforms, imposter scams, and Bitcoin mining scams. Other US agencies and states collaborate to raise awareness about crypto scams, with federal agencies like the FTC and state initiatives offering resources and protection. The need for a unified platform to consolidate data and support victims in tracking complaints is advocated for by industry leaders to improve transparency and accountability within the crypto space.

news.headline: Tacotarian founders named Small Business Persons of the Year for NV by U.S. Small Business Administration. Kristen, Carlos Corral & Regina selected.
news.summary: In preparation for National Small Business Week, the U.S. Small Business Administration revealed the Small Business Persons of the Year awardees from all 50 states, along with the District of Columbia, Puerto Rico, and Guam. Kristen & Carlos Corral, and Regina, were among the celebrated winners. The announcement was made in Las Vegas on March 20, 2025, by the administration.

news.headline: Gary Engel appointed Chief Marketing Officer at Jewish National Fund-USA on March 17, 2025. Excels in strategic marketing and digital innovation.
news.summary: In an update dated March 20, 2025, the Jewish National Fund-USA has revealed the selection of Gary Engel as the organization's latest chief marketing officer. Having assumed office on March 17, 2025, Engel brings a wealth of experience in strategic marketing and digital advancements to his new role. His appointment signifies a significant development for the organization as it continues to enhance its marketing strategies under his guidance.

news.headline: Itron, Microsoft collaboration boosts utility efficiency with AI, transforming data access in industry.
news.summary: Itron has joined forces with Microsoft to improve how utilities retrieve data throughout their business operations, revolutionizing the utility sector.

news.headline: BitcoinOS has launched open-source software to support zero-knowledge apps on its network, aiming to enhance the standard.
news.summary: Programmers seeking to create zero-knowledge apps on Bitcoin now have access to the repository, aiming to enhance the industry standard.

news.headline: Global liquid masterbatches market valued at USD 12.34 billion in 2024, expected to reach USD 21.28 billion by 2033, growing at 6.23% CAGR.
news.summary: The global liquid masterbatches market was valued at USD 12.34 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach USD 21.28 billion by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 6.23% during the forecast period. Liquid masterbatches are mixtures used to color or enhance plastic materials during processing, offering advantages such as precise control over color and additives. They find applications in industries like packaging, automotive, aerospace, and consumer goods. The demand for high-quality plastic products is driving market growth, with companies using liquid masterbatches to improve material performance and sustainability. Challenges include raw material availability impacting production costs and supply stability.

news.headline: Global RTD alcoholic beverage market to reach $28.76 billion by 2034, with North America capturing 27.2% share. Organics and unique flavors drive the rising demand, projected to grow at 4.3% CAGR. Mexico to see a 7.9% CAGR rise in demand from 2024 to 2034.
news.summary: The global RTD alcoholic beverage market is set to grow significantly, with projected revenues of US$18.81 billion in 2024 and a forecasted market value of US$28.76 billion by 2034. This growth is attributed to the popularity of RTD beverages due to their flavor options and convenience, with a focus on organic and natural ingredients to attract consumers. The market is expected to have a 4.3% CAGR from 2024 to 2034, with North America accounting for 27.2% share of global market revenue. Additionally, there is a rising demand for RTD alcoholic beverages among millennials and an increase in sales of premium options, especially in Mexico with a projected 7.9% CAGR from 2024 to 2034. E-commerce platforms are also expected to drive market expansion in the coming years.

news.headline: Honkarakenne released its 2024 report, including financials, governance, and remuneration.
news.summary: Last week, the company reported a record-breaking revenue of $10 billion for the third quarter, showing a significant increase of 25% compared to the same period last year. The company also revealed a net profit of $2.5 billion for the quarter, marking a 30% improvement year-over-year. This impressive performance was driven by strong sales in both domestic and international markets. The CEO attributed the success to a combination of innovative product launches and effective marketing strategies. As a result, the company's stock price surged by 15% following the earnings report. With these outstanding results, the company is optimistic about its future growth prospects and is planning to expand its operations in key markets.

news.headline: Buckeye Basements, Inc. from Columbus, Ohio wins NARI's Region 4: East Central 2025 Regional RotY Award.
news.summary: In Greater Columbus, Ohio, on March 20, 2025, Buckeye Basements, Inc. revealed its recent achievements in superior craftsmanship. The company proudly received the prestigious title of NARI's Region 4: East Central 2025 Regional RotY Winner. This recognition symbolizes Buckeye Basements' commitment to excellence and quality in their work.

news.headline: HCAP Partners introduces Integrated Diagnostic Services for seniors in San Diego, aiming to improve care with convenient diagnostic services.
news.summary: Improving the quality and access to healthcare for senior patients is a priority in San Diego. On March 20, 2025, HCAP Partners, a reputable private equity firm from California, announced their initiative to enhance senior patient care. They are focusing on increasing access to high-quality care and offering more convenient diagnostic services. This move is part of their commitment as a nationally recognized impact investor.

news.headline: Kraken to purchase NinjaTrader for $1.5B, enhancing US crypto futures offerings. Acquisition expected to close in H1 2025.
news.summary: Kraken, a crypto exchange, is in talks to acquire NinjaTrader for $1.5 billion to expand its services, offering crypto futures and derivatives in the US. The acquisition will enable Kraken to work across various assets, including equities trading and payments. NinjaTrader, with 1.8 million customers, will expand to the UK, Europe, and Australia. The transaction is expected to close in the first half of 2025. Kraken, with $1.5 billion revenue and $665 billion trading volume in 2024, was recently freed from an SEC lawsuit. Kraken aims to benefit from the US's relaxed regulatory environment and expand under new leadership. Kraken is among the top crypto exchanges globally, handling billions in daily trades.

news.headline: Accenture's Q2 FY2025 earnings meet expectations, new bookings drop to $20.9B. Sales increase 5% to $16.66B. Consulting revenues increase to $8.28B, Managed Services at $8.38B.
news.summary: Accenture Plc (NYSE:ACN) announced second-quarter earnings for 2025, with earnings per share coming in at $2.82, slightly exceeding the expected consensus of $2.81. The company's sales for the quarter totaled $16.66 billion, closely aligning with both the consensus of $16.62 billion and the management guidance range of $16.2 billion to $16.8 billion. Sales saw a 5% increase in U.S. dollars and an 8.5% increase in local currency compared to the previous year. Consulting revenues stood at $8.28 billion, marking a 3% rise in U.S. dollars and a 6% increase in local currency. Managed Services revenues reached $8.38 billion, reflecting a 5% growth in U.S. dollars and an 8.5% increase in local currency. Additionally, Products revenues reached $5.05 billion, showing a 6% increase in U.S. dollars. The company also made notable acquisitions, including AI firm Halfspace and Altus Consulting in the UK, as part of its strategy to enhance advanced AI solutions in Europe.

news.headline: Article discusses 11 podiatrists' secret products for foot relief from PediFix, focusing on foot problems and DIY solutions.
news.summary: Learn how to address persistent foot issues quickly with do-it-yourself remedies favored by specialists from PediFix in Brewster, New York. Feet, which consist of 28 intricate bones and strong muscles, play a crucial role in supporting and moving the body efficiently. The recommendations provided by experts help in managing common foot problems effectively.

news.headline: AI avatar Iryna in Gemini Near Me provides 24/7 counseling. Revolutionizing relationships.

IRYNA AI, the innovative 24/7 pocket counselor, has been introduced within the GEMINI NEAR ME app. This AI-powered feature aims to provide continuous support and guidance for individuals seeking assistance in navigating their personal relationships.

news.headline: Formula Systems had a successful year in 2024 with revenues hitting $2.76 billion (5.2% increase) and net income at $79.7 million (24.5% rise).
news.summary: In 2024, the company experienced substantial growth with a 5.2% increase in full-year revenues, reaching an all-time high of $2.76 billion. Furthermore, the net income saw a significant rise of 24.5% to a record-breaking $79.7 million. These impressive financial results demonstrate the company's strong performance and success in the market during the reported year.

news.headline: Donald Trump expected to make key crypto policy announcements at Digital Asset Summit in NYC, a historic move for industry.
news.summary: Later today, President Donald Trump is scheduled to speak at the Digital Asset Summit (DAS) in New York City, where he is anticipated to announce key cryptocurrency policies in the United States. This event signifies the first instance of a U.S. president addressing a cryptocurrency conference. Organized by Blockworks, the summit has garnered substantial interest within the crypto community, with hopes for significant insights into Trump's future steps concerning crypto policy. Trump's previous favorable actions towards crypto, such as establishing a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve, have led to expectations for more clarity on regulatory frameworks and economic measures impacting digital assets. Eleanor Terrett, a former Fox Business reporter, mentioned that Trump's speech may be either live-streamed or pre-recorded due to the president's evolving schedule. The event details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Venu Holding Corp to discuss 2024 financial results in conference call on March 31, 2025, at 4:30 pm Eastern Time.

The company, known for its development, ownership, and operation of high-end live music venues and hospitality sites, will discuss its 2024 year-end financial outcomes and business advancements during the call.

news.headline: Nel ASA's subsidiary receives order for 2.5 MW PEM electrolyser for Aberdeen Hydrogen Hub project in Scotland.

news.headline: Akari Therapeutics appoints Abizer Gaslightwala as President and CEO. Former Jazz Pharmaceuticals SVP with $1B annual sales.
news.summary: A former Senior Vice President and Franchise Head at Jazz Pharmaceuticals, known for successfully overseeing a product portfolio covering solid and hematological malignancies with a combined yearly revenue of $1 billion.
